header_info.title: Global Iron Ore Mines Tracker - August 2025
header_info.citation: Recommended Citation: "Global Energy Monitor, Global Iron Ore Mines Tracker, August 2025 (V1) release." (See the CC license for attribution requirements if sharing or adapting the data set.)
header_info.contact: Contacts: Henna Khadeeja, Research Analyst, Heavy Industry, henna.khadeeja@globalenergymonitor.org Caitlin Swalec, Program Director, Heavy Industry caitlin.swalec@globalenergymonitor.org

entries.name: Proposed
entries.definition: A mine is considered “proposed” if at any stage prior to that (announced, leasing, permitting, construction, etc.)

entries.name: Operating
entries.definition: A mine is considered “operating” if iron ore is coming out of the ground for commercial purposes.

entries.name: Shelved
entries.definition: A mine is considered “shelved” if there are no updates or evidence of the proposed project developing for more than 2 years.

entries.name: Retired
entries.definition: A mine is considered "retired" if it is either permanently closed or non-operational for more than one year.

entries.name: Mothballed
entries.definition: A mine is considered "mothballed" if the mine is not operating, but not officially retired and has operated within the past year.

entries.name: Cancelled
entries.definition: A mine is considered “cancelled” if the project has been officially cancelled or there are no updates or evidence of the proposed project developing for more than 3 years.

entries.name: Production
entries.definition: Production is actual tonnes of iron ore produced at a mine in a given year.

entries.name: Design Capacity
entries.definition: Design capacity is the maximum amount of ore that the mine is designed to produce annually. Due to the nature of mine exploration and planning, actual production can exceed design capacity when reserves and/or resources prove to be larger than initially identified or a mine extracts beyond planned capacity.

entries.name: Total Resources
entries.definition: Total resources is the cumulative quantity of iron ore deposits identified through exploration of the mine. Where known, resources are recorded inclusive of reserves.

entries.name: Total Reserves
entries.definition: Total reserves is the amount of iron ore that has been deemed economically viable for extration based on current geological, engineering, and economic data.

entries.name: ttpa
entries.definition: thousands of metric tonnes per annum

entries.name: GEM Asset ID
entries.definition: A unique GEM identifier is assigned to each Mine. Uses format P10000012XXXX where P stands for "project", and XXXX increases with every new project added to the Global Iron Ore Mines Tracker.

entries.name: Asset name (English)
entries.definition: Projects are named using a non-conforming name used by the company or government that supercedes our standards. For all other projects, the project name format is "Parent Company Location Mine" (ex. "XYZ London Mine" for an iron ore Mine located in London and owned by company XYZ)

entries.name: Asset name (other language)
entries.definition: Include language in english (ie "Stahlwerke (German)")

entries.name: Coordinates
entries.definition: Ideally coordinate for center of Mine. If several Mines are clustered together, do best to identify individual Mine. If exact location is unknown, use central coordinates of lowest level of address known (i.e. city, then subnational unit, country as last resort).

entries.name: Coordinate accuracy
entries.definition: exact = location confirmed via satellite imagery, approximate = location estimated or undefined

entries.name: Municipality
entries.definition: Municipality (city, village, town)

entries.name: Subnational unit
entries.definition: Subnational unit (province, state)

entries.name: Country/Area
entries.definition: Country or area

entries.name: Region
entries.definition: WEO Region

entries.name: Production 2024 (ttpa)
entries.definition: Total production data of the year 2024 (thousands of metric tonnes per annum) of iron ore

entries.name: Production 2023 (ttpa)
entries.definition: Total production data of the year 2023 (thousands of metric tonnes per annum) of iron ore

entries.name: Production 2022 (ttpa)
entries.definition: Total production data of the year 2022 (thousands of metric tonnes per annum) of iron ore

entries.name: Design Capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: The production capacity of the mining asset that has been declared or permitted by the company in thousands of metric tonnes per annum. Due to the nature of mine exploration and planning, actual production can exceed design capacity when reserves and/or resources prove to be larger than initially identified.

entries.name: Total Reserves (Proven and Probable, thousand metric tonnes)
entries.definition: Total reserves of the iron ore mines asset over its lifetime (thousands of metric tonnes)

entries.name: Total Resource (Inferred, Indicated and Measured, thousand metric tonnes)
entries.definition: Total resources of the iron ore mines indicate the total deposits of the iron ore within each iron ore mine site (thousands of metric tonnes). Inclusive of reserves when known.

entries.name: Operating status
entries.definition: Categories are "proposed", "operating", "shelved", "mothballed", "cancelled", and "retired".

entries.name: Start Date
entries.definition: Date that iron ore Mine began producing in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", "YYYY-MM" or "YYYY" as acceptable formats.

entries.name: Stop Date
entries.definition: Date that iron ore Mine stopped producing or plans to stop producing in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", "YYYY-MM" or "YYYY" as acceptable formats.

entries.name: Owner
entries.definition: Immediate owner/operator of iron ore Mine.

entries.name: Owner GEM Entity ID
entries.definition: A GEM identifier assigned to each company and owner through the Global Ownership Tracker.

entries.name: Owner name in local language/script
entries.definition: Immediate owner/operator of iron ore Mine in local language

entries.name: Parent
entries.definition: Ends of parent branches for the Mine owner from GEM's Global Energy Ownership Tracker data.

entries.name: Parent GEM Entity ID
entries.definition: A GEM identifier assigned to each company and parent through the Global Ownership Tracker.

entries.name: GEM wiki page URL
entries.definition: Link to GEM wiki page in English.
